title: Vrede Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Vrede, with a Z-Score of -3.11. This event has been classified as CRITICAL with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Vrede are unusually cold, with a significant impact on the area. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 11.9 GG, indicating a high energy demand for heating. 
 The humidity is at 82% and the wind speed is at 6.2 km/h, with no Cooling Degree Days (CDD) recorded.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the cold snap immediately.
